en: Then Eliphaz the Temanite answered and said:
zh: 提幔人以利法回答說：

en: "Can a man be profitable to God? Surely he who is wise is profitable to himself.
zh: “人對 神能有甚麼益處呢？ 明智的人只能益己。

en: Is it any pleasure to the Almighty if you are in the right, or is it gain to him if you make your ways blameless?
zh: 你為人公義可討全能者喜悅嗎？ 你行為完全可有利於他呢？

en: Is it for your fear of him that he reproves you and enters into judgment with you?
zh: 他是因你敬畏他而責備你， 對你施行審判嗎？

en: Is not your evil abundant? There is no end to your iniquities.
zh: 你的罪惡不是很大嗎？ 你的罪孽不是沒有窮盡嗎？

en: For you have exacted pledges of your brothers for nothing and stripped the naked of their clothing.
zh: 你無緣無故強取兄弟的東西作當頭， 剝去衣不蔽體的人的衣服。

en: You have given no water to the weary to drink, and you have withheld bread from the hungry.
zh: 疲乏的人你沒有給他水喝， 飢餓的人你沒有給他飯吃。

en: The man with power possessed the land, and the favored man lived in it.
zh: 有勢力的人就有土地， 尊貴的人住在其中。

en: You have sent widows away empty, and the arms of the fatherless were crushed.
zh: 你叫寡婦空手而去，你折斷孤兒的膀臂。

en: Therefore snares are all around you, and sudden terror overwhelms you,
zh: 因此有網羅環繞著你， 恐懼也忽然使你驚慌。

en: or darkness, so that you cannot see, and a flood of water covers you.
zh: 光明變成黑暗，以致你看不見， 並且洪水淹沒你。

en: "Is not God high in the heavens? See the highest stars, how lofty they are!
zh: 神不是高於諸天嗎？ 你看看最高的星星，多麼的高啊！

en: But you say, 'What does God know? Can he judge through the deep darkness?
zh: 你說：‘ 神知道甚麼？ 他能透過幽暗施行審判嗎？

en: Thick clouds veil him, so that he does not see, and he walks on the vault of heaven.'
zh: 密雲把他遮蓋，使他不能看見我們； 他在天上的圓圈上面走來走去。’

en: Will you keep to the old way that wicked men have trod?
zh: 你要謹守古往的道， 就是惡人所行走的嗎？

en: They were snatched away before their time; their foundation was washed away.
zh: 他們未到時候，就被抓去， 他們的根基被洪水沖去。

en: They said to God, 'Depart from us,' and 'What can the Almighty do to us?'
zh: 他們對 神說：‘離開我們吧！ 全能者能把我們怎麼樣呢？’

en: Yet he filled their houses with good things- but the counsel of the wicked is far from me.
zh: 他用美物充滿他們的房屋， 惡人的謀算遠離我。

en: The righteous see it and are glad; the innocent one mocks at them,
zh: 義人看見了，就歡喜； 無辜的人嘲笑他們，說：

en: saying, 'Surely our adversaries are cut off, and what they left the fire has consumed.'
zh: ‘我們的對頭必被剪除， 他們剝下來的有火吞滅了。’

en: "Agree with God, and be at peace; thereby good will come to you.
zh: 你與 神和好，就可以得平安， 這樣，福樂就必臨到你。

en: Receive instruction from his mouth, and lay up his words in your heart.
zh: 你該從他口中領受訓誨， 把他的話放在心裡。

en: If you return to the Almighty you will be built up; if you remove injustice far from your tents,
zh: 你若歸向全能者，就必得建立； 你若使不義遠離你的帳棚，

en: if you lay gold in the dust, and gold of Ophir among the stones of the torrent bed,
zh: 把你的金塊丟在塵土中， 把俄斐的金塊丟在河流的石頭間，

en: then the Almighty will be your gold and your precious silver.
zh: 全能者就必作你的金塊， 作你的銀堆，

en: For then you will delight yourself in the Almighty and lift up your face to God.
zh: 你就必以全能者為樂， 向 神仰起臉來。

en: You will make your prayer to him, and he will hear you, and you will pay your vows.
zh: 你向他祈求，他就垂聽你， 你也要還你的願。

en: You will decide on a matter, and it will be established for you, and light will shine on your ways.
zh: 你決定的計劃，他必為你成全， 光明必照在你的路上。

en: For when they are humbled you say, 'It is because of pride'; but he saves the lowly.
zh: 人謙卑的時候，你就說：‘升高吧！’ 眼中謙卑的他必拯救，

en: He delivers even the one who is not innocent, who will be delivered through the cleanness of your hands."
zh: 並非無辜的人， 神尚且搭救他； 他要因你手中的潔淨得救拔。”
